subcodes.title: Kitab al-Hayakil
subcodes.first_line: God is Most Great! In the name of God, the Inaccessible, the Most Holy. Praise be Him in Whose grasp is the kingdom of the heavens and the earth and whatever lieth between them
subcodes.first_line_orig: الله اعظم بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحان الذی فی قبضته ملکوت [ملک] السموات و الارض و ما بینهما فلتقدس الله یومئذ فی دین الحق نصرا عظیما
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
